positive: A stylized, geometric floral wreath featuring interconnected elements of minimalist lavender stalks, sage green foliage, and deep indigo blue accent flowers. The design should have a clean, continuous silhouette, rendered in a modern, abstract tattoo art style with crisp linework and flat color blocking. The composition must be perfectly centered and scalable for apparel printing, with strong contrast against a white background. Include subtle negative space utilization to enhance the elegance of the pattern. Vector graphic quality, perfect symmetry, high detail, clean outlines, flat design aesthetic.
negative: blurry, noise, watermark, text, signature, messy, gradient, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, jpeg artifacts, cropped, busy
